description: Optimize GeoServer storage by creating a dedicated tile cache location. Create a directory at /home/ga/geoserver/cache/countries and configure a new File System BlobStore named 'countries_store' pointing to this directory. Configure the 'ne:ne_countries' layer to use this new BlobStore and trigger a seed for zoom levels 00-03 to verify tiles are written to the new location. GeoServer is available at http://localhost:8080/geoserver/web/ (admin / Admin123!).
